title: Ransomware Deployment via Phishing Email — Finance Department
affected_systems: FS01 (10.0.0.30) — Windows Server 2019, Finance file server

timeline.event: Phishing email received by mwilson from spoofed address accounts-payable@corp-invoices.net with subject 'URGENT: Invoice #8821 requires approval'. Attachment: Invoice_8821.docx
mwilson opened Invoice_8821.docx in Microsoft Word. Macro execution prompt appeared and was accepted by the user.
Malicious macro launched PowerShell.exe with base64-encoded command. PowerShell downloaded payload from hxxp://corp-invoices.net/p.exe and executed it.
Payload (LockBit 3.0 variant) established persistence via Run key: HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run\WindowsUpdate.
Ransomware began enumerating and encrypting local files on WKS-FINANCE01. File extension changed to .lockbit3.
Ransomware used SMB (port 445) to access FS01 (finance file server) using mwilson's credentials and began encrypting network shares.
Wazuh EDR alert triggered: mass file rename/encryption activity on FS01. SOC analyst notified.
SOC analyst isolated WKS-FINANCE01 and WKS-FINANCE03 from network via firewall rule. FS01 taken offline manually.
Incident escalated to IR team. P1 incident ticket INC-2025-0042 opened in osTicket.

mitre_techniques: T1059.001 - Command and Scripting Interpreter: PowerShell
T1547.001 - Boot or Logon Autostart Execution: Registry Run Keys
T1021.002 - Remote Services: SMB/Windows Admin Shares
root_cause: User mwilson received a targeted spearphishing email impersonating a known vendor. The email bypassed email gateway filtering due to a newly registered domain. The user enabled macros in the malicious Word document, triggering the ransomware infection chain.
business_impact: Approximately 2,400 finance department files encrypted across WKS-FINANCE01, WKS-FINANCE03, and FS01. Finance operations disrupted for estimated 6-8 hours. No data exfiltration confirmed at time of report.
initial_containment: WKS-FINANCE01 and WKS-FINANCE03 isolated. FS01 taken offline. mwilson and tjones accounts disabled pending investigation. C2 IP (91.92.248.101) blocked on perimeter firewall.
